codeReview.summary: The commit fixes the malformed-provider retry regression in `server/ats-scorecard.mjs` and adds useful regression coverage, but the feature is still not fully ready: live ATS requests from the browser continue to violate the published v1 request contract, so webhook-mode compatibility is not actually stabilized.

issues.description: `buildAtsScorecardRequestPayload()` always adds `providerHint` to the ATS request body, but `schemas/ats-scorecard-request.v1.schema.json` declares `additionalProperties: false` and does not define that field. Any webhook receiver that validates against the published v1 schema can reject these live requests, so the feature still misses its ATS webhook/server contract-readiness goal.

`normalizeAtsRequestPayload()` strips `providerHint` before calling `analyzeAtsScorecard()`, even though `server/ats-scorecard.mjs` still contains hint-handling logic. That leaves server-mode and webhook-mode ATS runs with different semantics for the same browser payload and makes the hint path effectively dead in local server mode.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance and worker procedure disagree about git cleanliness: the mission requires preserving a dirty baseline, but the worker recorded a deviation from a clean-status step in the base skill. This mismatch will keep forcing unnecessary skill deviations on future features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission `AGENTS.md` says to treat the current dirty working tree as baseline and never clean unrelated changes; this feature handoff records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: false` because step `3.2 Environment Cleanup / Ensure clean git status` conflicted with that rule.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ATS contract guardrail only validates static example fixtures, so runtime request-builder drift is currently invisible to shared validation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `scripts/test-ats-scorecard-contract.mjs` validates only `examples/ats-scorecard-request.v1.json` and `examples/ats-scorecard-response.v1.json`, while the live browser builder in `app.js:14592` sends an extra `providerHint` field that is not declared in `schemas/ats-scorecard-request.v1.schema.json`.

summary: Reviewed the mission feature entry, handoff, transcript skeleton, shared-state docs, skill guidance, and commit `8ceb1eb0636d204f79862484aca06f063632bb66`. The malformed-provider retry fix itself looks sound, but the feature still fails readiness because live ATS webhook requests are off-contract and server-mode strips the same hint field, leaving transport semantics inconsistent.
